title: 5 Business Taxes User Management
body_text:
5	Business Taxes User Management
5.1	Creating Business Taxes Users
This chapter provides specific information required for giving users access to Business Taxes. General information on
PaymentStream
芒聞垄
Direct user management can be found in the
PaymentStream
Direct Part. Access to Business Taxes is via the Client Centre. A Business Taxes user must be set up as a Client Centre User or a CPS Admin Security Officer. See the User Management Part or the CPS Admin Application Part, as applicable, for procedures on creating, modifying, and deleting Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers.
Note:	Currently, there are two user management applications running parallel: CPS Admin and User Management. Eventually, User Management will replace CPS Admin. CPS Admin Security Officers are encouraged to use the User Management application.
CPS Admin Security Officers complete the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918, or the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, as appropriate, for Administrative Rights and/or Personal Access Rights to the testing and/or production environment in Business Taxes.
Related Information
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate,
Form 1918
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
5.2	Granting Access to the Test Environment
Access to the test environment is optional and is used for training purposes only. To grant users access to the test environment(s):
Select the following boxes in CPS Admin to assign access to the test environment for Client Centre users. See Figure 1.
芒聢聮
PSD-Business Taxes
芒聙聯 Grants the user access to the Business Taxes function.
芒聢聮
PSD-Deny
芒聙聯 Denies the user access to the production environment.
芒聢聮
PSD-Prev-CompTest
芒聙聯 Grants the user access to the test environment that mirrors production.
芒聢聮
PSD-SYS
芒聙聯 Grants the user access to the test environment where changes appear two weeks before they芒聙聶re deployed in production.
Figure 1: Access to Test Environment
5.3	Granting Access to the Production Environment
The production environment is used for submitting filings and payments to CRA via Central 1. If a user is set up with access to the test environment(s) as shown above:
Remove the check mark in the box beside PSD-Deny. See Figure 2. This allows access to the production environment. It芒聙聶s not necessary to de-select access to the test environment(s).
Figure 2: Allowing Access to Production Environment
To grant users access to the production environment only:
Select the box beside
PSD-BusinessTaxes
. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Granting Access to Production Environment
END
